strengths: Strong Excel and Advanced Excel skills
weaknesses: Limited explicit experience with structured feedback processes
improvement_bullets: Developed and managed complex models using MS Excel and Google Sheets to perform detailed data quality audits and document analysis, ensuring 100% adherence to internal compliance and structured guidelines.

Drafted and presented comprehensive project reports and analytical findings using Google Slides and Microsoft PowerPoint, providing structured feedback to stakeholders to enhance evaluation processes.
Utilized Google Docs to maintain detailed project documentation and operational SOPs, ensuring team alignment and consistency during complex document review cycles.
Collaborated asynchronously with cross-functional teams to review domain-specific documentation, ensuring high-quality, actionable, and accurate outputs under strict project deadlines.
Evaluated and audited technical datasets, providing structured feedback and recommendations to project leads to refine document review processes and increase reporting accuracy.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Spreadsheet Analyst - Fully Remote | Upto $150/hr opportunity with Mercor. I am interested in this role because of Mercor's unique position at the intersection of elite human talent and AI research, which requires a rigorous, detail-oriented approach to document evaluation that aligns perfectly with my analytical background.

What interests me about working for Mercor is its innovative approach to connecting top-tier professionals with cutting-edge AI labs, which intrigues me because of the high stakes and technical depth involved in those industries. I believe my expertise in Advanced Excel and Google Sheets, combined with my proficiency in delivering structured feedback, would make me a strong candidate for this role.

During my professional career, I have approached problems with an emphasis on extreme attention to detail. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual data processing was a bottleneck; I developed complex Excel and Google Sheets models to automate these flows, allowing for structured, error-free analysis. As a result, I reduced data processing time by 40% while ensuring all outputs met executive-level quality standards—an impact that directly translates to the rigorous evaluation requirements at Mercor.

Ultimately, I know that the Spreadsheet Analyst role at Mercor would allow me to bring my advanced data analysis skills to the critical task of maintaining high-quality document standards. Additionally, my experience as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my skills in technical documentation and adherence to structured guidelines. I led a project to document operational workflows and SOPs for new hire onboarding, which required meticulous review of existing processes to ensure compliance and consistency. This initiative reduced onboarding time by 50% while guaranteeing that every team member had a reliable, standardized reference point.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my document analysis skills in working on the quality and accuracy reviews at Mercor. I know that my analytical rigor and technical proficiency align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,

Justin Miller
